locator.quote: this manifests as post-BC BCE 0.75/0.79 (vs v7 single-day no

text: pos_weight gives worse raw calibration in v8 (post-BC BCE 0.75/0.79 vs v7 no-pos_weight 0.26/0.35), consistent with pos_weight-destroys-calibration.

locator.quote: biased UP slightly seems to align with the gate's strict

text: The head's outputs biased up slightly seem to align with the strict 0.85 gate — more genuine positives above threshold, marginal true-negatives below.

locator.quote: v9 (vanilla BCE) tests whether this is a happy

text: v9 (vanilla BCE) is the control to test whether pos_weight helping is a happy accident or whether un-weighted BCE calibrates even better.
